BaseField.Name: Label23
BaseField.Text: Instructions: If the information populated below is not the payer for this transaction, update the contact information for the payer.

BaseField.Name: lblSameBillingAddress
BaseField.Text: Mailing address is the same as the Billing address:

BaseField.Name: btnAddItemsToCart
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Add Items Back to Cart Button

BaseField.Name: DG Payment Items
BaseField.DataFilter: [Payment_Items_Work_Queue].[Payment Item Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Payment_Items_Work_Queue].[Payment Item Related Record ID] <>''

BaseField.Name: lblPaymentTypeInstructions
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Select Pay to go through the online credit card process.

BaseField.Name: lblTransactionID
BaseField.Text: Transaction ID or Check Number:*

BaseField.Name: Transaction ID or Check Number
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Transaction ID or Check Number field Required

BaseField.Name: Label43
BaseField.Text: Instructions: This section is only visible to VaultAccess users. Check Administrator Override to remove read-only configurations and show all fields. Select Admin Save to save any changes without applying business rules. Remember to uncheck override and save before closing.

BaseField.Name: CHKReturnedProviderNOTSendNewCHK
BaseField.Text: Provider will NOT send new check

Group.GroupName: Billing Address - Same As Mailing Address
